feed.title: andyshearer blog
feed.subtitle: The musings of Andy Shearer, a product manager who can't let go of his developer upbringing. Lives in Cheshire, UK.

entry.title: Hello, my dear internet user.
entry.content:
Doing something new and starting to publish some of my thoughts is an exciting but terrifying endeavour. You may know me in real life, you may not, but I want to say hello. I’ll post irregularly. There will be grammatical mishaps.

So welcome. I’ll try my best.
entry.summary: Doing something new and starting to publish some of my thoughts is an exciting but terrifying endeavour. You may know me in real life, you may not, but I want to say hello. I’ll post irregularly. There will be grammatical mishaps.
